task: compress AGENTS.md under 3072-byte workspace per-file budget (issue #2034)

events.content: Ran caveman-compress on AGENTS.md; file already terse, minimal gain (3228 to 3221 B, still over 3072 cap)
Analyzed test_workspace_limits.py; identified 3072 B hard cap; measured candidate with lossless rewording + Agents roster removal
Applied changes to AGENTS.md: dropped Agents roster (user-approved), lossless rewording, restored Autonomy Guardrail label after review caught terminology drift
Created issue #2034; verified 7 open PRs CI-red on test_per_file_limit[AGENTS.md]; posted evidence comment to #2034
